title: It Pays to Advertise
writer: Ethel Doherty, Walter C. Hackett, Arthur Kober
actors: Norman Foster, Carole Lombard, Richard 'Skeets' Gallagher
plot: To prove his thesis that any product--even one that doesn't exist--can be merchandized if it is advertised properly, a young man gets together with his father's savvy secretary to market a non-existent laundry soap. Complications ...
